About The Company
MANO Projects Pvt. Ltd. is a multi disciplinary Construction & Management firm established in September 2010 by Mr. Mugilan Muthaiah and Mrs. Amirthavalli Mugilan, having its head office in Mumbai.
Our firm consists of young, qualified, committed, disciplined and dynamic professionals offering innovative management ideas and wide range of Project Management Consultancy, Planning, Budgeting and Quality control services & Contracting.
With over 25+ reputed clients and 90+ projects, we have successfully established ourselves in Maharashtra, Gujarat, Goa, Kerala, Karnataka, Andhra Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh & Telangana.

Why MANO Project Consultants Private Limited?
End-to-End Project Expertise
From feasibility to final handover, we ensure comprehensive management, evaluation, and control at every step.
Explore More
Efficient Scheduling & Budgeting
We specialize in scheduling using CPM & PERT, ensuring cost-effective and timely completion.
Explore More
Quality Assurance & Transparency
We follow strict QA/QC procedures to maintain consistency and transparency across all stages of execution.
Explore More

Punctual in Time
Particular in Commitment
0%+ Client Satisfaction Rate
CORE VALUES
Discipline
Punctuality
Accountability
Integrity
Collaboration
Responsibility
Feedback
Innovation

Vision
To be the major part of real estate sector with self-owned Real Estate projects & Industrial projects.
To be known for its excellent, competent engineers who establish client trust by completing challenging tasks within time.
Target of our company is to cover 6 Million Sq.ft. of construction work by 2025-26 FY & Turnover shall be 50 CR.
Mission
Develop lasting client relationship by providing exceptional stakeholder value in an environment of trust and respect.
Develop values, ethics, vision and expectations that balance the needs of all the stakeholders.
Utilization of new creation via youngsters & Tier 2/3 cities.
Social Responsibility / Pollution free Planet.
Collective ownership of the assigned project.

About The Team
Mr. Mugilan Muthaiah
Founder & CEO
Expertise
Construction Management
NICMAR Alumni
Strategic Leadership
"With a Post Graduate program in Construction Management from NICMAR Pune and Civil Engineering background, he has worked with reputed companies across various projects. A specialist in Residential, Retail, and Hospitality projects with a clear vision and successful leadership."
Committed to integrity, transparency, and client satisfaction.
Mrs. Amirthavalli Mugilan
Board of Director
Expertise
Office Administration
Vendor Management
HR & Coordination
"Studied Graduate in Business Administration, she has sound experience in office administration pertaining to the construction field. Her role involves entire office administration, vendor management, HR, and interdependent coordination with all stakeholders."
Driving operational excellence and organizational growth.
Mr. N Subramanian
Project Director
Expertise
Large Scale Projects
Hospitality & Commercial
Infrastructure
"Holds a strong experience of more than 25+ years into management of large scale construction projects. He has worked at various top-level management positions in highly esteemed companies. He has completed more than 80 Lakh sq. ft of construction at various sites across India."
Expert in Residential, Retail, and Hospitality typologies.
Our Engineering Strength
A dedicated team of 50+ young, dynamic & qualified engineers mentored by industry leaders.

TRUSTED BY INDUSTRY LEADERS

Why Businesses Choose MANO Consultants
With 12 years of excellence, we blend deep industry knowledge with client-centric
approach to deliver measurable results in every project.
End-to-End Project Expertise
From feasibility to final handover — complete lifecycle management under one roof.
Cost Efficiency & Transparency
Accurate estimations, budgeting, and specialist cost control ensure optimal financial performance.
Quality-Focused Delivery
Strict QA/QC processes, audits, and compliance frameworks for flawless execution.

Why Clients Trust Us
Predictable Delivery
Timely execution backed by strong planning and monitoring.
Transparent Processes
Fully documented, audit-ready systems at every step.
Cost & Risk Control
Data-driven decisions ensure optimized cost and minimized risk.
End-to-End Support
From drawings to handover — we manage everything.

Specialized Digital ERP
Management Systems
Technology-Driven Execution Monitoring. We leverage a modern, specialized ERP for tracking and making the flow of work efficient across all our services, from engineering approvals to site progress.
Specialized ERP Dashboards
Procurement & Workflow Trackers
Work-flow Performance Analytics
Real-time Efficiency Models

Our Services
Project Management
Seamless execution, monitoring, and milestone-driven progress tracking.

His working pattern and management skills are excellent. He puts in complete effort along with his team, and his setup has been a great support to our firm.

CONTRACT MANAGEMENT
Contract
Management
Quantity Surveying, Bill of Quantities, Tender Preparation, Tender Floating, Comparisons, Negotiations & Finalisation of Vendors
Learn More

11+
YEARS OF CONTRACT EXPERTISE
499+
CONTRACTS REVIEWED & ADMINISTERED
99+
PROJECTS COMMERCIALLY MANAGED
94%
DISPUTE AVOIDANCE SUCCESS RATE

Core Contract Management Services
BOQ & Tender Preparation
Comprehensive preparation of Bill of Quantities and tender documents.
KEY ACTIVITIES:
Prepare BOQ and tender as per drawings received from concerned consultants.
Identifying cost-saving opportunities without compromising on quality or scope.
Prepare tender document including terms, scope, and technical specifications.
Tender Process Management
Managing the entire tender lifecycle from floating to evaluation.
KEY ACTIVITIES:
Reviewing tenders based on cost, compliance, and technical capability.
Send out pre-qualification notices to shortlisted contractors.
Conduct pre-bid meetings with prospective contractors.
Evaluate tender and prepare techno-commercial comparative statements.
Negotiation & Finalization
Expert negotiation to ensure alignment with project goals.
KEY ACTIVITIES:
Negotiating with selected bidder to finalize terms and pricing.
Assist client in finalization of contractors for different disciplines.
Contract Documentation
Finalizing legal and commercial documentation for execution.
KEY ACTIVITIES:
Preparation of final contract documents based on techno-commercial discussions.
Preparation of amendment orders according to corrections in management.

Specialized Contract ERP
Compliance Systems
Our digital ERP ensures 100% compliance tracking, claim management, and risk mitigation through a centralized and audit-ready contract management portal.
Compliance Tracking Dashboards
Claim Management Systems
Risk Mitigation Analytics
Digital Document Repository
